findings.title: CVE-2026-32922 — OpenClaw device.token.rotate Scope Overminting → RCE on Nodes (CVSS 9.9, THIS INSTANCE VULNERABLE)
findings.summary: Callers with operator.pairing scope can call device.token.rotate to mint tokens with any scope — including operator.admin — enabling full RCE on connected nodes via system.run or unauthorized gateway-admin access; THIS instance is running v2026.2.21-2 and is confirmed vulnerable.

findings.title: CVE-2026-32987 — OpenClaw Bootstrap Code Replay → operator.admin Privilege Escalation (CVSS 9.3, THIS INSTANCE VULNERABLE)
findings.summary: Bootstrap setup codes can be replayed before approval in device-bootstrap.ts (CWE-294) to escalate pending pairing scope to operator.admin; THIS instance is running v2026.2.21-2 and is confirmed vulnerable.

findings.title: GHSA-4749-wr9h-9qxx — OpenClaw MEDIA: Protocol Zero-Auth File Exfiltration (API Keys, Session History, System Prompts — THIS INSTANCE FULLY VULNERABLE)
findings.affected_technology: OpenClaw <= 2026.3.13; partial fix in 2026.3.22 (workspace/ still accessible)
findings.summary: Any group chat member injects MEDIA: tokens to exfiltrate LLM API keys, session history, and system prompts; bypasses tools.deny:['*'] and all approval controls; partial fix in v2026.3.22 still leaves workspace/ files readable; THIS instance (v2026.2.21-2) has zero mitigation.

findings.title: CVE-2026-32973 — OpenClaw exec Allowlist Glob Bypass via ? Wildcard Across Path Separators (CVSS 9.8, THIS INSTANCE VULNERABLE)
findings.summary: matchesExecAllowlistPattern lowercases and applies ? glob matching that spans path segments, allowing operators' exec allowlist rules to be bypassed and unintended commands executed; THIS instance is vulnerable.

findings.title: CVE-2026-32975 + CVE-2026-32924 — OpenClaw Zalo & Feishu Group Authorization Bypasses (CVSS 9.8, THIS INSTANCE VULNERABLE)
findings.summary: Two critical group auth bypasses: CVE-2026-32975 matches mutable Zalo group display names so cloned groups bypass allowlists; CVE-2026-32924 misclassifies Feishu reaction events with missing chat_type as p2p, bypassing groupAllowFrom and requireMention; both affect THIS instance.

findings.title: CVE-2026-32914 + CVE-2026-32915 — OpenClaw /config Access Control Bypass + Subagent Sandbox Escape (CVSS 8.8, THIS INSTANCE VULNERABLE)
findings.summary: CVE-2026-32914: command-authorized non-owner users access owner-only /config and /debug to read/modify privileged settings; CVE-2026-32915: sandboxed leaf subagents resolve against parent requester scope, enabling sibling session control and broader tool policy execution; both affect THIS instance.

findings.title: CVE-2026-32974 — OpenClaw Feishu Webhook Auth Bypass — Forged Event Injection to Tool Execution (CVSS 8.6, THIS INSTANCE VULNERABLE)
findings.affected_technology: OpenClaw < 2026.3.12 Feishu webhook mode (current instance: v2026.2.21-2)
findings.summary: Feishu webhook with only verificationToken (no encryptKey) accepts forged events, allowing unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary Feishu events and trigger downstream tool execution; THIS instance is vulnerable.

findings.title: CVE-2025-30189 — Dovecot Auth Cache Regression: Users Authenticated as Wrong Account (CVSS 7.4)
findings.affected_technology: OX Dovecot CE core <= 2.4.0 / OX Dovecot Pro core <= 3.1.0 (IMAP/LMTP servers)
findings.summary: v2.4 regression breaks auth cache with several passdb/userdb drivers: all users with the same cache key are authenticated as the same cached user, constituting an authentication bypass; fixed in CE 2.4.1 / Pro 3.1.2; no public exploits.

findings.title: CVE-2025-59032 — Dovecot ManageSieve AUTHENTICATE Panic — Repeated Remote DoS (CVSS 7.5)
findings.affected_technology: OX Dovecot CE 2.4.x / OX Dovecot Pro 3.1.x (ManageSieve service)
findings.summary: ManageSieve AUTHENTICATE command crashes when a literal is used as SASL initial response (as sent by sieve-connect), enabling repeated crash/DoS of the ManageSieve service; fixed in CE 2.4.3 / Pro 3.1.3; no public exploits.

findings.title: CVE-2026-3098 — Smart Slider 3 WordPress Plugin Arbitrary File Read — 800K Sites, ~500K Still Unpatched
findings.affected_technology: Smart Slider 3 WordPress plugin <= 3.5.1.33 (800K+ active installations)
findings.summary: Subscriber-level authenticated WordPress users can read any server-side file including wp-config.php (DB credentials and secret keys); patch in v3.5.1.34 released March 24; approximately 500K sites estimated still unpatched.

findings.title: MailEnable <= 10.54 — Three Reflected XSS in Webmail (KIS-2026-05, PoC Public, No CVE Assigned)
findings.summary: Three reflected XSS vulnerabilities in MailEnable webmail (ManageShares.aspx?SelectedIndex, FreeBusy.aspx?Attendees, FreeBusy.aspx?StartDate) allow arbitrary JavaScript execution; full PoC URLs publicly disclosed by Egidio Romano; fixed in MailEnable 10.55 (released March 2).

noted.summary: session_status sandbox escape: sandboxed subagents supply arbitrary sessionKey to read/modify parent or sibling session state, including persisted model overrides (CVSS 8.4). Fix: upgrade to >= 2026.3.11.

system.run approval TOCTOU: tsx/jiti script runners don't bind file operands at approval time; rewrite script after approval to execute modified code under approved context (CVSS 8.0). Fix: upgrade to >= 2026.3.11.
Telegram webhook buffers full POST body before validating x-telegram-bot-api-secret-token, enabling unauthenticated memory/socket exhaustion DoS (CVSS 7.5). Fix: upgrade to >= 2026.3.13.
Write-scoped callers issue /new or /reset slash commands to reset targeted sessions without operator.admin (CVSS 6.1). Fix: upgrade to >= 2026.3.11.

noted.product: OX Dovecot Pro >= 2.3.0 (fixed in CE 2.4.0 / Pro 3.1.0)
noted.summary: Pre-auth path traversal: %d domain escape in passwd-file passdb escapes base directory and reads /etc/passwd (CVSS 5.3). Fix: upgrade or avoid passwd-file passdb with user-controlled domain input.
Invalid base64 SASL data disconnects auth server process, causing all concurrent authentication sessions to fail — targeted DoS (CVSS 5.3). Fix: upgrade to CE 2.4.3 / Pro 3.1.2.
Authentication bypass listed by GitHub Security Lab; details pending full disclosure. Monitoring for PoC and severity confirmation.

noted.product: Eclipse Che machine-exec / Red Hat OpenShift DevSpaces
noted.summary: ESCALATION: Unauthenticated WebSocket RCE on port 3333 (JSON-RPC) now has a public Metasploit module as of the March 27 wrap-up. Previously noted; operators who have not yet patched face significantly elevated risk.
New Metasploit module (March 27 wrap-up) for unauthenticated ESC/POS command injection over TCP; allows arbitrary print commands and potential RCE on networked printers in retail/POS environments.

FortiGuard Labs: No large-scale Iranian cyber retaliation observed following US-Israeli strikes as of March 2026. Regional activity is rising; recommend credential rotation, reduced internet exposure, and heightened monitoring for affected organizations.

Key stats: exploitation of CVSS 7-10 vulns increased 105% YoY; median time from disclosure to CISA KEV fell from 8.5 to 5.0 days; ransomware in 42% of incidents; stolen credentials without MFA in 43.9% of incidents. AI accelerating attacker tradecraft.
